subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! Mention hath been made of thee before Us, whereupon the ocean of grace and bounty surgeth, and showereth its gifts upon thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان یا امتی قد ذکر بین یدینا ذکرک لذا تموج بحر العنایه و الافضال و یترشح علیک
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
